provider: HKUST 2025/26 BBA in Operations Management Major Requirements
note: This cohort-specific supplement binds only the plain BBA in Operations Management Major for students admitted in 2025-26. It records the two Major Required courses, the complete 12-course restricted OM elective list for Business Analytics Option students, and the explicitly named requirements of the two optional Options. Students without an Option instead choose any four ISOM courses coded 3500-3999 except ISOM 3780, or 4500-4999, totaling at least 12 credits; this dynamic range is not converted into a permanent closed graduation pool. Business Analytics Option students must choose four courses from the recorded restricted list for the OM elective requirement, then complete ISOM 3360 and ISOM 3900 in addition; Option Required Courses may not also count toward the OM elective requirement. Supply Chain Management Option students complete ISOM 3760 plus one of ISOM 3730, ISOM 4740, ISOM 4750, or ISOM 4780. Students may graduate without an Option. No individual Year or semester is inferred from anonymous or grouped pathway placements. School Requirements, University Common Core, Legal Education, and additional electives used to reach 120 credits remain outside this Programme-local supplement.
